_value.title: AMD Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
_value.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif., Feb. 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) today announced financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025.
